zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan於1350年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾音巴爾吉普時，他的父親Robert II Stewart King of Scotland34歲，母親Moira De Leche30歲。他於大約1408年與Janett Semphill在蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1400年住在蘇格蘭布特。他於1400年被列為hereditary sheriff of bute - by royal charter。他去世於1441年5月24日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年91歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan于1350年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾音巴爾吉普时，他的父亲Robert II Stewart King of Scotland34岁，母亲Moira De Leche30岁。他于大约1408年与Janett Semphill在苏格兰薩瑟蘭结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1400年住在苏格兰布特。他于1400年被列为hereditary sheriff of bute - by royal charter。他去世于1441年5月24日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林享年91岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯林史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan was born in 1350, in Inverkip, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, was 34 and his mother, Moira De Leche, was 30. He married Janett Semphill about 1408, in Sutherland, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Bute, Scotland in 1400. In 1400, his occupation is listed as hereditary sheriff of bute - by royal charter. He died on 24 May 1441, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 91, and was buried in Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan est né en 1350, à Inverkip, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Moira De Leche, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Janett Semphill environ 1408, à Sutherland, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Bute, Écosse en 1400. En 1400, sa profession de son indiquée est hereditary sheriff of bute - by royal charter. Il est décédé le 24 mai 1441, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan 1350 in Inverkip, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert II Stewart King of Scotland 34 und seine Mutter Moira De Leche 30. Er hat um 1408 in Sutherland, Scotland Janett Semphill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1400 hat er in Bute, Scotland gelebt. 1400 ist sein Beruf als hereditary sheriff of bute - by royal charter aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. Mai 1441 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan è nato il nel 1350 nel Inverkip, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Moira De Leche, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Janett Semphill circa 1408, nel Sutherland, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Bute, Scotland nel 1400. Nel 1400, la sua occupazione è indicata come hereditary sheriff of bute - by royal charter. Morì il 24 maggio 1441, nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolto a Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowanが1350年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアインバーキップで生まれた時，父Robert II Stewart King of Scotlandは34歳，母Moira De Lecheは30歳であった。約1408年にスコットランドススエルランドでJanett Semphillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年にはスコットランドブトに住んでいた。1400年，職業はhereditary sheriff of bute - by royal charterと記録されている。彼は1441年5月24日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで91歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan(이)가 1350년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 인버키프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert II Stewart King of Scotland(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Moira De Leche(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1408년 스컷랜드 서덜랜드에서 Janett Semphill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1400년도에 스컷랜드 부트에서 살았다. 1400년, 그의 직업은 hereditary sheriff of bute - by royal charter이었다. 그는 1441년 5월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan nasceu em 1350, em Inverkip, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Moira De Leche, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Janett Semphill aproximadamente 1408, em Sutherland, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Bute, Scotland em 1400. Em 1400, sua profissão aparece como hereditary sheriff of bute - by royal charter. Ele faleceu em 24 de maio de 1441, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan родился в 1350 г. в местности инвиркип, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert II Stewart King of Scotland было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Moira De Leche, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Janett Semphill около 1408 г. в местности сутирланд, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности бут, Шотландия в 1400 году. В 1400 году он работал по профессии hereditary sheriff of bute - by royal charter. Он умер 24 мая 1441 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

sm.from 1400 to 1445: mai le 1400 e o'o I le 1445

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan nació en 1350, en Inverkip, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Moira De Leche, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Janett Semphill aproximadamente 1408, en Sutherland, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Bute, Scotland en 1400. En 1400, su ocupación registrada era hereditary sheriff of bute - by royal charter. Murió el 24 de mayo de 1441, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultado en Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
